description: Tracks every portal correction so the agent learns patterns and stops repeating mistakes

corrections.fix: Remove ® — FlexPro Armor is NOT registered

corrections.rule: Always show ALL orders including new ones

corrections.issue: Skylift deal card said Darrell Pickle
corrections.fix: Replaced with correct Skylift PO description
corrections.rule: Skylift trucks are Aaron's PO to sell, not a customer deal
Follow-ups default to OPEN unless explicitly marked done

corrections.issue: Samson tab showed 30% margin as customer price
corrections.fix: Clarified 30% is cost from Samson, not sell price
corrections.rule: Aaron's actual margin to customers is 40-60%+
Gridco is dead. Remove everywhere. Never re-add.
Never remove auth from internal pages
Pipeline = all active deal values summed
Never hardcode dates or day counts

corrections.fix: Added Lato+Playfair CDN link to all HTML files
corrections.rule: Every HTML file needs Google Fonts CDN in <head>

corrections.fix: Replaced with dollar-sign SVG on gradient background

norris2026 = aaron, legacy2026 = cb — never swap or expose
